arts.ttl: "Quite far" - Arne Slot provides Joe Gomez injury update ahead of Nottingham Forest clash
arts.sum: Liverpool manager Arne Slot has confirmed that defender Joe Gomez is not close to a return from injury ahead of the Reds' Premier League clash against Nottingham Forest.

arts.ttl: Analysis: Will Forest repeat their Anfield success?
arts.sum: While Elanga and Morgan Gibbs-White are both hugely important cogs in Forest's counter-attacking wheel, it is their 24-year-old left winger who tends to do the most damage on the back of ball carries. Their winning goal in the 72nd minute involved both wide men, with Hudson-Odoi converting one of the most eye-catching counter-attacks of the season.

arts.ttl: Mega-rich club prepared to offer Liverpool star a staggering deal which will more than double his wages
arts.sum: Liverpool’s Darwin Nunez has become the subject of strong transfer interest, with Saudi Pro League giants Al-Hilal reportedly planning a massive offer to lure the Uruguayan striker away from Anfield. According to Anfield Watch, Al-Hilal are prepared to offer Nunez a staggering £400,000 per week in wages—more than doubling his current Liverpool earnings of around […] The post Mega-rich club prepared to offer Liverpool star a staggering deal which will more than double his wages appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: 'Direct contact made' - Liverpool eyeing Bayern star as Alexander-Arnold replacement?
arts.sum: Liverpool have reportedly made direct contact with Bayern Munich regarding a potential transfer for Joshua Kimmich as a possible replacement for Trent Alexander-Arnold.

arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest make new signing just 24 hours before huge Liverpool clash
arts.sum: Liverpool travel to Nottingham Forest on Tuesday night

arts.ttl: Will Forest prove they are title contenders against Liverpool?
arts.sum: When Guardiola admitted his team were "lucky" to come back and beat Brentford 3-1 last September, the reigning champions had an 100 per cent record in the Premier League and it was the week before Rodri picked up his season-ending injury. Forest have won each of their last six Premier League games, while a win over Liverpool would equal their longest ever winning run.

arts.ttl: Can Nottingham Forest really win the Premier League?
arts.sum: Before they face leaders Liverpool on Tuesday, BBC Sport looks at whether Nottingham Forest can really win the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Forest in title race, says Liverpool boss Slot
arts.sum: Liverpool boss Arne Slot says Nottingham Forest '"deserve'" to be considered Premier League title contenders.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot makes hilarious claim about Nottingham Forest that will leave fans in hysterics
Liverpool predicted lineup vs Nottingham Forest - Premier League
arts.sum: How Liverpool could line up for Tuesday's battle with Nottingham Forest in the Premier League.
